content.heading: Welcome
content.text: Welcome to BarkinMad Studios. These Terms and Conditions govern your use of the BarkinMad Studios website located at https://www.barkinmad.studio and any content, services, applications, or information made available through the website. By accessing or using this website, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, please do not use this website.

content.heading: About Us
content.text: BarkinMad Studios is an independent software and game development studio based in the United Kingdom. This website provides information about our applications, games, software development services, company news, and related content.

content.heading: Website Content
content.text: All content published on this website is provided for general information purposes only. While we make reasonable efforts to ensure information is accurate and up to date, BarkinMad Studios makes no warranties or representations regarding the completeness, accuracy, reliability, or availability of any content. Content may be updated, modified, or removed at any time without notice.

content.heading: Intellectual Property
content.text: Unless otherwise stated, all content on this website, including text, graphics, logos, images, software, game assets, branding, and design elements, is owned by BarkinMad Studios or licensed to BarkinMad Studios and is protected by applicable intellectual property laws. You may view, download, and print content for personal, non-commercial use only. You may not reproduce, distribute, modify, republish, or commercially exploit website content without prior written permission.

content.heading: Applications and Software
content.text: Applications, games, and software products published by BarkinMad Studios may be subject to separate terms, licences, platform agreements, or store policies. Where applicable, those terms will take precedence over these website terms.

content.heading: Third-Party Services and Links
content.text: This website may contain links to third-party websites, services, or platforms, including Apple App Store, Google Play, Facebook, GitHub, Cloudflare, and other external websites. BarkinMad Studios has no control over third-party websites and accepts no responsibility for their content, privacy practices, or availability. Accessing third-party websites is at your own risk.

content.heading: Advertising
content.text: This website may display advertisements provided by third-party advertising partners. Advertising providers may use cookies or similar technologies in accordance with our Privacy Policy and Cookie Policy. We do not control the content of advertisements served by third-party advertising networks.

content.heading: Limitation of Liability
content.text: To the fullest extent permitted by law, BarkinMad Studios shall not be liable for any loss, damage, costs, or expenses arising from use of this website, reliance on information published on this website, website interruptions or downtime, third-party links or services, or technical issues beyond our control. Nothing in these Terms excludes liability that cannot legally be excluded under applicable law.

content.heading: Privacy
content.text: Your use of this website is also governed by our Privacy Policy and Cookie Policy.

content.heading: Changes to These Terms
content.text: We may update these Terms and Conditions from time to time. Any updates will be published on this page with a revised Last Updated date. Continued use of the website following changes constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.

content.heading: Contact Us
content.text: If you have any questions regarding these Terms and Conditions, please contact us through the Contact page on this website.
